notes: MinIO is an S3-compatible object store, not a REST/JSON API; the adaptor wraps the minio JS client (AWS S3 XML protocol). Synthesized a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the adaptor surface, modelling each operation the adaptor exposes (createBucket, listObjects, getObject, putObject, getObjectTags, setObjectTags) as JSON REST shapes so mocker can seed bucket/object/tag collections. Tag operations placed under /{bucketName}/{objectName}/tagging (S3 uses a ?tagging subresource, which cannot be distinguished by method in OpenAPI paths). Server URL is a MinIO default placeholder.
